'''Squollyhawlks''' were massive worm-like creatures native to [[Arorua]]. One nearly killed [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] during his visit there in [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]. A false face located on top of the squollyhawlk's head was meant to make its prey believe that it was a smaller creature hiding in the foliage. It would then ambush the unsuspecting prey.

Squollyhawlks were vulnerable to having their mandibles smashed; if this happened, they would be unable to eat and would die.

{{Creature-stub}}
